Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"fetch_historical_stock_prices","description":"Fetch historical stock prices.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"tickers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"start_date":{"type":"string"},"end_date":{"type":"string"}},"required":["tickers","start_date","end_date"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"calculate_future_returns","description":"Calculate future returns under named scenarios.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"tickers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"scenarios":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"growth_rate":{"type":"number"}},"required":["name","growth_rate"]}}},"required":["tickers","scenarios"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"assess_portfolio_risk","description":"Assess portfolio risk using a risk model.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"portfolio":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"ticker":{"type":"string"},"weight":{"type":"number"}},"required":["ticker","weight"]}},"risk_model":{"type":"string"}},"required":["portfolio","risk_model"]}}}]</tools>
Analyze AAPL, MSFT, and GOOGL from 2020-01-01 to 2023-01-01, estimate optimistic, pessimistic, and neutral future returns, and assess the portfolio with VaR.
